---
title: "Projects"
---

Welcome to the rabbit hole. Each project is a deep dive into something I found interesting — different data, different tools, same curiosity.

---

## 01 — Retail Energy Markets

*Familiar waters. First dive.*

Exploring customer behaviour, pricing pressure, and hardship metrics in the Australian retail energy market — through the lens of someone who works in it.

**Tools:** R · Tableau · Quarto

[Dive in →](projects/260428_retail_energy/index.qmd)
